display_text: Giant's Ring, Tier Neutral: Provides no bonus stats but increases model size by 60%. Can path over any terrain including cliffs and trees. Deals damage equal to 100% of your strength per second to enemies stood upon in a 100 radius, making it effective for area denial and trapping enemies. Stats: Model Scale: +60%, Damage: 100% Strength per second, Radius: 100.
